subsystems.summary: Wave 1 native menu ownership is closed for the claimed scope.
Wave 1 native message/text ownership is closed for the claimed scope.
Battle has real native ownership and diagnostics. Wave 1 closure signoff exists; promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps.
mainGaps: Wave 1 closure signoff exists; promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps

subsystems.summary: Save/data runtime, diagnostics, RPG Maker MV/MZ binary save loading, and end-to-end compat save import into native runtime-owned state are landed. Wave 1 closure signoff exists; promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps.
mainGaps: Wave 1 closure signoff exists; promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps

subsystems.summary: Compat bridge exit has truthful Phase 2 closure evidence, weekly regression cadence, diagnostics/export parity for the bounded import and verification lane, and an explicit signoff artifact; promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps.
mainGaps: Compat bridge exit signoff exists; promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps
Curated corpus maintenance and ongoing truth upkeep remain future work

subsystems.summary: Presentation runtime, bridge, compiled spatial editor panels, end-to-end authoringâ†’runtime proof path, and release validation harness are landed. Promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps.
mainGaps: Real renderer backend integration (currently mock-backed) remains future work
Profile arena hot-reload path remains unregistered
Promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps

subsystems.summary: Gameplay ability runtime, inspector/editor surfaces, structured diagnostics snapshot, end-to-end release-grade test, and closure signoff artifact are landed. Promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps.
mainGaps: Schema contracts and compat-to-native migration mapping remain future work
Real gameplay loop integration into BattleScene/MapScene ability command queue remains future work
Promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps

subsystems.summary: Governance foundation has first-slice artifacts landed: breaking-change detection, enhanced readiness checks, template specs, bidirectional readiness/truth drift detection, project-audit artifact checks for accessibility, audio, and performance, and a canonical release-signoff workflow artifact.
mainGaps: Diagnostics/export parity and full release-signoff enforcement beyond the current artifact-backed governance workflow remain future work

subsystems.summary: Character identity runtime, editor creator panel, ECS component/system integration, and deterministic spawner are landed with schema and focused tests.
mainGaps: Full Create-a-Character workflow (runtime character creation UI, appearance preview pipeline) remain future work

subsystems.summary: Achievement registry with progress tracking, unlock conditions, trigger parsing, event-bus auto-unlock, and editor panel are landed.
mainGaps: Achievement validator is landed with EmptyId, EmptyTitle, EmptyUnlockCondition, ZeroTarget, DuplicateId, and EmptyIconId checks.
Trophy export pipeline and platform-specific achievement backend integration remain future work.

subsystems.summary: Accessibility auditor with missing-label, focus-order, contrast, and navigation rules is landed.
mainGaps: Menu inspector live-ingestion adapter is landed; additional editor surfaces (spatial, audio, battle) still require dedicated adapters.
Automated CI enforcement of accessibility report artifacts is validated by check_accessibility_governance.ps1.

subsystems.summary: Visual regression harness with golden file management, diff heatmaps, approval tooling, and a file-backed executable harness gate is landed.
mainGaps: Integration with real render output capture and CI golden gate remain future work

subsystems.summary: Audio mix preset bank with default profiles, category volume mapping, ducking rules, and editor panel is landed.
mainGaps: Audio mix preset validator is landed with MissingDefaultPreset, ConflictingDuckRules, VolumeOutOfRange, and EmptyCategoryVolumes checks.
Live audio backend integration beyond the current compat-truth harness remains future work.

subsystems.summary: Platform-specific export validator with per-target requirement checking, synthetic pack-and-validate pipeline, PowerShell CI script with JSON output, and diagnostics panel with post-export artifact surfacing is landed.
mainGaps: Real asset bundling and binary synthesis remain stubbed; synthetic emitted tree is used for validation

subsystems.summary: Mod registry with manifest registration, dependency resolution, load-order topology, and editor manager panel is landed.
mainGaps: Live mod loading, sandboxed script execution, and mod-store integration remain future work

subsystems.summary: Opt-in analytics dispatcher with deterministic tick counters, event buffering, circular drop, and editor panel is landed.
mainGaps: Telemetry upload pipeline, session aggregation, and privacy audit workflow remain future work

templates.safeScope: Wave 1 native-first baseline with truthful residual gaps.
mainBlockers: Battle and save closure remain open
Cross-cutting readiness bars are not complete

templates.safeScope: Dialogue-heavy projects within current native message and save scope.
A conservative turn-based template slice similar to jrpg without implying broader productization.
mainBlockers: Cross-cutting readiness bars and dedicated template governance remain incomplete

templates.safeScope: First-class tactics template lane with early implementation anchors in battle, presentation, and save systems.
mainBlockers: Cross-cutting readiness bars are not complete

templates.safeScope: First-class action-RPG template lane with early implementation anchors in presentation and save systems.
Exploration of collection-driven combat and party assembly using landed Wave 1 + ability framework.
mainBlockers: Dedicated collection schema, capture mechanics, and template-grade governance remain future work

templates.safeScope: Dialogue-heavy life-sim exploration within current message/save/menu scope.
mainBlockers: Scheduling system, social relationship mechanics, and crafting/economy lanes remain future work

templates.safeScope: 2D action exploration using presentation runtime and ability framework.
mainBlockers: Traversal mechanics (dash, wall-jump), map unlock system, and ability-gated progression remain future work

templates.safeScope: Mandatory 2.5D template lane built around the raycast-capable presentation stack and save integration.
mainBlockers: Raycast art pipeline, map authoring adapters at production grade, and template-specific export validation remain future work
